description:
Vision
Enable efficient, accurate, and secure management of financing application data as the foundation for all review and approval workflows.
Risks and Dependencies
Risks include incomplete data validation, UI inconsistencies, and potential for mock data to not represent real-world edge cases. Dependencies include the need for a robust data model and reusable UI components.
Epic Goals
- Allow users to view, search, and filter financing applications
- Support creation and editing of application records
- Ensure data integrity and validation at all stages
- Provide a responsive, modern UI for data exploration
- Enable mock data generation for demonstration purposes
Success Metrics
- 100% of application records are valid and complete
- Application list loads in <2 seconds for up to 100 records
- No data loss or corruption during navigation or editing
- User can locate a specific application in <10 seconds
- All demo data covers at least 5 unique business scenarios
